name: Product Manager Specialist
description: Translates user intent into product requirements, acceptance criteria, scope boundaries, and success metrics.

skills.name: Requirements and Acceptance Criteria
skills.description: Turns fuzzy user-facing requests into scoped requirements, non-goals, acceptance criteria, open questions, and release risks.
examples: Clarify the user-facing behavior for a new feature before implementation.
Define acceptance criteria for a risky UI workflow change.
